effect.content: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

governance.preferred_form: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

rule_text: Administration convenience statements must use verbatim wording: "LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required."
intent: Maintain accurate compliance guidelines concerning pill delivery claims compared to injections.
summary: Administration convenience statements must exactly read: "LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.
